title: FacetFilter
description: A single facet filter definition for a Gateway Grid. FacetFilters are polymorphic: the 'type' property discriminates which additional properties are valid. Each variant extends a shared base of common properties (type, field, label, placeholder).

filterBase.description: Properties shared by every facet filter variant.

type.description: Discriminator identifying the filter's UI widget and matching behaviour.

field.description: The Collection field key this filter is applied to. Must match a field key returned by the collection's REST endpoint.

label.description: Human-readable label displayed above the filter control.

placeholder.description: Placeholder hint shown inside the control when no value is selected. For two-input filters (range, date_range) this may be an object with named keys for each input.

selectChoice.description: A single option in a select or checkbox filter.

value.description: Raw value submitted to the filter when this option is selected.

label.description: Human-readable text displayed for this option.

selectFilter.description: A single-value select dropdown (<select>). Maps to the gateway/filter-group block (statusFilter attribute). The user picks one value; the grid shows records matching that value. Omitting 'choices' signals that the UI should derive options dynamically from the live dataset.

choices.description: Static list of selectable options. At least one entry when provided. Omit to let the UI derive choices from live data.

textFilter.description: A free-text search input. Applies a case-insensitive substring match against the target field. Input is debounced to reduce unnecessary re-renders on large datasets.

debounce.description: Milliseconds to wait after the last keystroke before the filter fires. Lower values feel more responsive; higher values reduce render pressure on large datasets. Defaults to 300.

checkboxFilter.description: A multi-select checkbox group. Maps to the gateway/checkbox-filter block. The user may select any number of values; the filter passes a record if its field value matches any selected option.

choices.description: Static list of checkbox options. Omit to derive options from live data.

valueKey.description: When options are derived at runtime from a context source, the property name to use as the submitted value. Defaults to 'value'.

labelKey.description: When options are derived at runtime from a context source, the property name to use as the display label. Defaults to 'label'.

rangeFilter.description: A numeric range filter with separate min and max inputs. Passes a record if its field value falls within [min, max], where both bounds are optional (open-ended range).

min.description: Minimum allowed input value enforced as an HTML constraint. Does not imply a default filter value — the input may be left blank.

max.description: Maximum allowed input value enforced as an HTML constraint.

dateRangeFilter.description: A date-range filter with start and end date inputs (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD). Uses HTML5 date inputs. Both ends are optional; omitting either makes the range open at that end.
